summary: This Spanish-language one-pager outlines KeepmeCompany as a London-based health-tech platform utilizing AI voice agents for patient communication and administrative efficiency. It details Class I Medical Device certification, GDPR compliance protocols, and specific use cases such as patient admission and follow-up in the UK and Spain. The document concludes with direct contact information for the CEO, Eduardo Lizana.
